name: java-html-tooling
description: Preview HTML-producing Java methods directly in VS Code.

java-html-tooling.cssFiles.description: List of CSS sources to include in preview. Supports: local file paths, glob patterns (relative to Maven project root), and external URLs (e.g., https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css)

java-html-tooling.inlineStyles.description: Additional CSS to inject inline into all previews (optional)

java-html-tooling.buildStrategy.description: Choose whether preview build/classpath resolution tries Java extension APIs first or Maven commands first.

java-html-tooling.debugLogs.description: Enable debug logging for preview build/classpath decisions and fallback behavior.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cwd=process.cwd(); fs.rmSync(path.join(cwd,'out'), { recursive: true, force: true }); for (const file of fs.readdirSync(cwd)) { if (file.endsWith('.vsix')) { fs.rmSync(path.join(cwd, file), { force: true }); } }"
